title: AI gateway/MCP identity checks и безопасное логирование prompt
goal: Убрать raw prompt из runtime logs и усилить проверку пользователя для AI gateway и MCP.
implementation_notes: Runtime logs should include request_id, conversation_id, prompt length/hash, model id and error class, not raw prompt.
Gateway execution should require verified session ownership or a stricter service-to-user binding.
MCP tools must not trust user_id/roles supplied by an arbitrary external caller as authorization evidence.
